highlights.description: Initial release of the Facilitator role for omnichannel meeting facilitation

added.description: Session tracking for action items, decisions, and discussion points
Role prompts for pre-meeting, during-meeting, and post-meeting phases
RoleSpec with responsibilities, behaviors, artifacts, and metrics
Support for required skills: meeting, google, confluence
Support for optional skills: chat, voice, aha, jira, github, gitlab

tests.description: Unit tests for role initialization and configuration

documentation.description: README with features, installation, quick start, and API reference
